days.drive: ~120 mi · ~2h15 over the Bay Bridge · ferry 4:15→~5:40 PM (85 min)
todo: Lewes: lunch + Second St in the “first town in the first state”
Ferry: at the Lewes terminal by 3:15 — check-in closes 3:45, sails 4:15 — watch for dolphins
days.note: Ferry is time-fixed now: miss the 3:45 check-in cutoff and the crossing is forfeit (+$26 no-show fee). Leave USNA by ~11:30 and a Lewes lunch still leaves an hour of slack. Same photo IDs work all day — Gate 1 and ferry check-in.
You woke at 4:30 AM Pacific. Keep it gentle. · 📝 From the night the app was finished (Jul 20): “I had a lot of fun building the app today. I hope you enjoy experiencing our trip!” — Clark

days.drive: ~85 mi · 2h30–3h15 — Bourne Bridge before noon · hotel is ~20 min past the bridge
todo: Rt-28 to the Uncommoner (135 Route 28, W Yarmouth) — check-in from 3 PM; drop bags, maybe a pool hour
Nauset Light + Coast Guard Beach after 3:30 (≈30 min east · $25 lots, cards only)
Rock Harbor sunset (≈25 min home after)
days.note: Your base is mid-Cape: the outer Cape runs 25–35 min east, so batch those stops. Evenings end well here — fire pits + the 9-ft indoor pool.

days.depart: Leave 8:25 — Chatham by 9 (≈30 min from W Yarmouth)
days.drive: Loop day: Chatham 30 min · Chatham→Wellfleet ~25 · P-town home leg ~55–60

days.depart: 8:30–9:00 AM — canal by 9:45 is easy from W Yarmouth

stops.urgency: Clark’s pick: Queen Anne Inn — “1 left” Jul 19 · 6 candidates loaded; card shows top 3 — tap “Not for us ✕” to rotate others in

options.name: Chapter House (Yarmouth Port)
options.caveat: Mid-Cape base ≈ +20–30 min on each touring day, net ~35–45 min over the stay after an easier departure morning (corrected from ‘~1 hour’) — and the extra lands on the late P-town drive home · 10,000 sq-ft event lawn = August-weekend wedding risk · no breakfast served · a soundproofing complaint · fast traffic on 6A
